title: Hornet Removal in Croton-on-Hudson, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Croton-on-Hudson, Westchester. Safe, effective nest elimination from $350-$550. Licensed experts serving riverside homes. Call now!
intro: Croton-on-Hudson's beautiful riverside properties and wooded neighborhoods provide ideal nesting sites for hornets, putting families and pets at risk. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional hornet removal services throughout Croton-on-Hudson, from historic homes near the Old Croton Aqueduct to properties along the Hudson River waterfront. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of specialized hornet removal experience to Croton-on-Hudson residents, with licensed technicians trained in safe nest elimination techniques. We understand the unique challenges of Westchester's suburban environment and offer same-day emergency service with guaranteed results and competitive pricing of $350-$550.
localContext: Croton-on-Hudson's mature trees, especially around Croton Point Park and residential areas near Mount Airy Road, attract hornets seeking sheltered nesting spots in eaves, attics, and sheds. The village's mix of Victorian-era homes and newer construction requires customized removal approaches to protect both your property's historic character and your family's safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Croton-on-Hudson?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout Croton-on-Hudson. Most nest eliminations are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location. Emergency services are available for nests near entryways or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes complete inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of the affected area, disposal of the nest, and a 30-day warranty. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements. We provide free estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for children and pets in my Croton-on-Hudson home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and professional-grade protective equipment to ensure complete safety for your family and pets. We establish safe perimeters during treatment and provide clear instructions for re-entry, typically within 2-4 hours of completion.

faqs.question: Do hornets return after nest removal in Croton-on-Hudson?
faqs.answer: Once we remove a hornet nest and treat the area, those hornets will not rebuild in the same location. We also identify and seal potential entry points and apply preventative treatments to discourage future nesting. Our 30-day warranty covers any residual hornet activity related to the original infestation.
